hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$o = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'SessionStart'; additionalContext = 'Git workflow skills available. Use Skill tool to invoke liam-git-workflow-bootstrap to discover all 10 Git workflow skills (branch, commit, sync, hotfix, release, diagnose, etc.), or liam-git-workflow as the main natural-language entry point.' } }; $o | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
